pages.code:
@player
@ispushable
@cycle 1
@char 2
@color white
@bg blue
'setup flags
#set hint
#set camera far
#set health 100
#set wickticks 250
#set facing 90
#clear mute
#clear ammo
#clear wick
#clear light
#clear torches
#clear gems
#clear score
#clear reload
#clear energized
#clear key0
#clear key9
#clear key10
#clear key11
#clear key12
#clear key13
#clear key14
#clear key15
:think
' sidebar code
"Simple $9 $9 $9 
" $9 $9 $9 Chat v1.14
"
#if hint do
"press $whiteC$yellow to chat 
"press $white#$yellow for cli
" 
"from the cli to
"set name
"$white#set user <name>
" 
"toggle built-in 
"gadget on or off
"$white#gadget
"with gadget users
"can edit the board
"
"$black$ondkcyan Ctrl+O 
"$ondkblue $whiteOpen the net
"
"$black$ondkcyan $24$25$26$27 $ondkblue $whiteMove
"$black$onltgrey Tab $ondkblue $whiteToggle
"$ondkblue $whitePlayer Stats
"
#else do
" $white$2 $yellow Health:$health
" $cyan$132 $yellow   Ammo:$ammo
' torch info
#set torchmeter " $brown$157 $yellowTorches:$torches"
#if torches < 10 do
 #set torchmeter torchmeter + "  "
#else if torches < 100 do
 #set torchmeter torchmeter + " "
#done
#if wick > 0 do
 #if wick > 50 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 100 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 150 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 200 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
#done
"$torchmeter
" $cyan$4 $yellow   Gems:$gems
" $yellow    Score:$score
' make keys section of sidebar
#set keylist " $white$12 $yellow   Keys:"
#if key0 set keylist keylist + "$black$12"
#if key9 set keylist keylist + "$blue$12"
#if key10 set keylist keylist + "$green$12"
#if key11 set keylist keylist + "$cyan$12"
#if key12 set keylist keylist + "$red$12"
#if key13 set keylist keylist + "$purple$12"
#if key14 set keylist keylist + "$yellow$12"
#if key15 set keylist keylist + "$white$12"
"$keylist
' hotkeys and input info
"
!lighttorch hk t;Torch
#if mute do
!soundon hk b;Be loud
#else do
!soundoff hk b;Be quiet
#done
"
"      $black$ondkcyan $24$25$26$27$ondkblue $whiteMove
"$black$onltgrey Shift $24$25$26$27$ondkblue $whiteShoot
"
#if graphics is fpv do
!turnleft hk q;Turn Left
!turnright hk e;Turn Right
#done
#done
'update code
#if inputmenu do
 #set hint 1 - hint
 #idle
#else if inputmove and inputshift do
 #if not reload do
  #give reload 3
  #take ammo do
   #ticker You don't have any ammo!
  #else do
   #shoot inputmove
  #done
 #done
 #idle
#else if inputmove do
 ?inputmove
#else idle
#done
'display code
#if energized above 0 do
 #if char is 2 do
  #char 1
 #else do
  #char 2
 #done
 #if currenttick % 2 is 1 do
  #color white
 #else do
  #color currenttick % 7 + 8
 #done
 #take energized
 #if not energized do
  #char 2
  #color white
 #done
#done
'timing code
#take reload
#take wick do
 #if light do
  #play tc-c-c
  #clear light
 #done
#done
'loop it
#think
:shot
#bgplay t--c+c---c+d#
#take health 10 do
 #ticker You died!
 #endgame
#else do
 #ticker Ouch!
 #think
#done
:lighttorch
#if not isdark do
 #ticker Don't need torch - room is not dark!
#else if light do
 #ticker Torch is already lit!
#else take torches do
 #ticker You don't have any torches!
#else do
 #set light 9
 #give wick wickticks
#done
#think
:soundon
#clear mute
#vol 80
#think
:soundoff
#set mute
#vol 0
#think
:turnleft
#give facing -90
#think
:turnright
#give facing 90
#think

object.name: player
object.code:
@player
@ispushable
@cycle 1
@char 2
@color white
@bg blue
'setup flags
#set hint
#set camera far
#set health 100
#set wickticks 250
#set facing 90
#clear mute
#clear ammo
#clear wick
#clear light
#clear torches
#clear gems
#clear score
#clear reload
#clear energized
#clear key0
#clear key9
#clear key10
#clear key11
#clear key12
#clear key13
#clear key14
#clear key15
:think
' sidebar code
"Simple $9 $9 $9 
" $9 $9 $9 Chat v1.14
"
#if hint do
"press $whiteC$yellow to chat 
"press $white#$yellow for cli
" 
"from the cli to
"set name
"$white#set user <name>
" 
"toggle built-in 
"gadget on or off
"$white#gadget
"with gadget users
"can edit the board

"$black$ondkcyan Ctrl+O 
"$ondkblue $whiteOpen the net

"$black$ondkcyan $24$25$26$27 $ondkblue $whiteMove
"$black$onltgrey Tab $ondkblue $whiteToggle
"$ondkblue $whitePlayer Stats
"
#else do
" $white$2 $yellow Health:$health
" $cyan$132 $yellow   Ammo:$ammo
' torch info
#set torchmeter " $brown$157 $yellowTorches:$torches"
#if torches < 10 do
 #set torchmeter torchmeter + "  "
#else if torches < 100 do
 #set torchmeter torchmeter + " "
#done
#if wick > 0 do
 #if wick > 50 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 100 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 150 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 200 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
#done
"$torchmeter
" $cyan$4 $yellow   Gems:$gems
" $yellow    Score:$score
' make keys section of sidebar
#set keylist " $white$12 $yellow   Keys:"
#if key0 set keylist keylist + "$black$12"
#if key9 set keylist keylist + "$blue$12"
#if key10 set keylist keylist + "$green$12"
#if key11 set keylist keylist + "$cyan$12"
#if key12 set keylist keylist + "$red$12"
#if key13 set keylist keylist + "$purple$12"
#if key14 set keylist keylist + "$yellow$12"
#if key15 set keylist keylist + "$white$12"
"$keylist
' hotkeys and input info
"
!lighttorch hk t;Torch
#if mute do
!soundon hk b;Be loud
#else do
!soundoff hk b;Be quiet
#done
"
"      $black$ondkcyan $24$25$26$27$ondkblue $whiteMove
"$black$onltgrey Shift $24$25$26$27$ondkblue $whiteShoot
"
#if graphics is fpv do
!turnleft hk q;Turn Left
!turnright hk e;Turn Right
#done
#done
'update code
#if inputmenu do
 #set hint 1 - hint
 #idle
#else if inputmove and inputshift do
 #if not reload do
  #give reload 3
  #take ammo do
   #ticker You don't have any ammo!
  #else do
   #shoot inputmove
  #done
 #done
 #idle
#else if inputmove do
 ?inputmove
#else idle
#done
'display code
#if energized above 0 do
 #if char is 2 do
  #char 1
 #else do
  #char 2
 #done
 #if currenttick % 2 is 1 do
  #color white
 #else do
  #color currenttick % 7 + 8
 #done
 #take energized
 #if not energized do
  #char 2
  #color white
 #done
#done
'timing code
#take reload
#take wick do
 #if light do
  #play tc-c-c
  #clear light
 #done
#done
'loop it
#think
:shot
#bgplay t--c+c---c+d#
#take health 10 do
 #ticker You died!
 #endgame
#else do
 #ticker Ouch!
 #think
#done
:lighttorch
#if not isdark do
 #ticker Don't need torch - room is not dark!
#else if light do

#else take torches do

#else do

@blinkwall
@cycle 1
@char 206
@p1 range;starting time
@p2 range;period
@shootx number -1 1
@shooty number -1 1
:think 
#if p3 is 0 do
 #set p3 p1 + 1
#else if p3 is 1 do
 ' either clear or shoot
 #if shooty is 0 do
  #set p4 blinkew
 #else do
  #set p4 blinkns
 #done
 #set p5 thisx + shootx
 #set p6 thisy + shooty
 #set p7 p5
 #set p8 p6
 ' clear blink walls
 #while any at p5 p6 "$color" "$p4" do
  #put at p5 p6 empty

kinddata.name: player
kinddata.code:
@player
@ispushable
@cycle 1
@char 2
@color white
@bg blue
'setup flags
#set hint
#set camera far
#set health 100
#set wickticks 250
#set facing 90
#clear mute
#clear ammo
#clear wick
#clear light
#clear torches
#clear gems
#clear score
#clear reload
#clear energized
#clear key0
#clear key9
#clear key10
#clear key11
#clear key12
#clear key13
#clear key14
#clear key15
:think
' sidebar code
"Simple $9 $9 $9 
" $9 $9 $9 Chat v1.14
"
#if hint do
"press $whiteC$yellow to chat 
"press $white#$yellow for cli
" 
"from the cli to
"set name
"$white#set user <name>
" 
"toggle built-in 
"gadget on or off
"$white#gadget
"with gadget users
"can edit the board
"
"$black$ondkcyan Ctrl+O 
"$ondkblue $whiteOpen the net
"
"$black$ondkcyan $24$25$26$27 $ondkblue $whiteMove
"$black$onltgrey Tab $ondkblue $whiteToggle
"$ondkblue $whitePlayer Stats
"
#else do
" $white$2 $yellow Health:$health
" $cyan$132 $yellow   Ammo:$ammo
' torch info
#set torchmeter " $brown$157 $yellowTorches:$torches"
#if torches < 10 do
 #set torchmeter torchmeter + "  "
#else if torches < 100 do
 #set torchmeter torchmeter + " "
#done
#if wick > 0 do
 #if wick > 50 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 100 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 150 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
 #if wick > 200 do
  #set torchmeter torchmeter + "$177"
 #else set torchmeter torchmeter + "$176"
 #done
#done
"$torchmeter
" $cyan$4 $yellow   Gems:$gems
" $yellow    Score:$score
' make keys section of sidebar
#set keylist " $white$12 $yellow   Keys:"
#if key0 set keylist keylist + "$black$12"
#if key9 set keylist keylist + "$blue$12"
#if key10 set keylist keylist + "$green$12"
#if key11 set keylist keylist + "$cyan$12"
#if key12 set keylist keylist + "$red$12"
#if key13 set keylist keylist + "$purple$12"
#if key14 set keylist keylist + "$yellow$12"
#if key15 set keylist keylist + "$white$12"
"$keylist
' hotkeys and input info
"
!lighttorch hk t;Torch
#if mute do
!soundon hk b;Be loud
#else do
!soundoff hk b;Be quiet
#done
"
"      $black$ondkcyan $24$25$26$27$ondkblue $whiteMove
"$black$onltgrey Shift $24$25$26$27$ondkblue $whiteShoot
"
#if graphics is fpv do
!turnleft hk q;Turn Left
!turnright hk e;Turn Right
#done
#done
'update code
#if inputmenu do
 #set hint 1 - hint
 #idle
#else if inputmove and inputshift do
 #if not reload do
  #give reload 3
  #take ammo do
   #ticker You don't have any ammo!
  #else do
   #shoot inputmove
  #done
 #done
 #idle
#else if inputmove do
 ?inputmove
#else idle
#done
'display code
#if energized above 0 do
 #if char is 2 do
  #char 1
 #else do
  #char 2
 #done
 #if currenttick % 2 is 1 do
  #color white
 #else do
  #color currenttick % 7 + 8
 #done
 #take energized
 #if not energized do
  #char 2
  #color white
 #done
#done
'timing code
#take reload
#take wick do
 #if light do
  #play tc-c-c
  #clear light
 #done
#done
'loop it
#think
:shot
#bgplay t--c+c---c+d#
#take health 10 do
 #ticker You died!
 #endgame
#else do
 #ticker Ouch!
 #think
#done
:lighttorch
#if not isdark do
 #ticker Don't need torch - room is not dark!
#else if light do
 #ticker Torch is already lit!
#else take torches do
 #ticker You don't have any torches!
#else do
 #set light 9
 #give wick wickticks
#done
#think
:soundon
#clear mute
#vol 80
#think
:soundoff
#set mute
#vol 0
#think
:turnleft
#give facing -90
#think
:turnright
#give facing 90
#think
